calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Kent Schmidt, Esq. for Plaintiff: Canon Business Solutions-West, Inc., a California corp., Plaintiff's Witness: Keiko Brockel, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Max Copy & Print, LLC, a California corp. as follows:
Damages $500,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $14,657.93
Costs $500.30, for a total of $515,158.23
Judgment signed in open court.
